user.title: User
user.description: Represents a user of the Altura platform.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

project.title: Project
project.description: A workspace for a team to collaborate on tasks.

description.description: A brief overview of the project.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns the project.

members.description: List of user UIDs who are members of this project.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

task.title: Task
task.description: A specific item of work within a project.

status.description: The current state of the task.

assigneeId.description: The UID of the user assigned to this task.

projectId.description: The ID of the parent project.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created.
